prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-HBSFTLRAS-FHB-BLCK Product Type: GUN_SUPPORT Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Flatline Ops Harris Bipod Slippers Accurate Shot True Line Recoil Sturdy Brace Description: HARRIS BIPOD SLIPPERS

ACHIEVE TRUE-LINE BIPOD RECOIL

Bipods are one of the most useful accessories you can have for your rifle. A sturdy brace at the front of your firearm can result in a more accurate shot, especially at long distances. But inherently, like any tool, they can be improved. Because of the rubber feet on the bipod it is hard to achieve a true even recoil. The feet can catch or bind up on any surface causing the gun to recoil improperly and can affect any shot with distance.

Another issue can be tracking your shot side to side and loading the center spring. Upon firing, the recoil path can be affected by the loaded spring throwing the bullet off target, again, especially over a longer distance.

SOLID, DURABLE CONSTRUCTION
Machined from battle tested Delrin Polymer, the bipod feet are virtually indestructible and easy to install. Simply snap the Slipper on the rubber bipod foot and you are ready to go. Search Terms: precision rifle shooting firearm accessories outdoors hunting long distance accuracy field game bubble level Features: - Helps eliminate ground loading - Helps eliminate ground drag - Helps eliminate bipod twist and torque - Helps achieve true line recoil - Slides easily over the ground helping to eliminate body position changes for faster target acquisition === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Flatline Ops Harris Bipod Slippers Black

anthropic.title_differentiation: Eliminate Ground Drag And Twist, True Line Recoil, Precise Long Distance Shooting, Delrin Polymer

openai.title_differentiation: True Line Recoil, Eliminates Ground Loading, Reduces Drag And Torque, Easy Snap On Install, Durable Delrin Polymer
